description.value: In the moment that matters, you do not hesitate.

system.benefits: Once per combat, when a creature within 10 feet drops to 0 HP, you may use a [Reaction] to immediately attempt Stabilize on them. Additionally, you may now use Field Dressing on a creature in the Dying condition. A successful Field Dressing on a Dying creature stabilizes them at 0 HP in addition to the normal HP restoration, which applies when they regain consciousness.

usage.text: Passive; emergency stabilization once per combat
